title: ElytraS (elytra swapper)
description:
In this mod you can switch your elytra to chestplate and then chestplate to elytra By only a key.  :)



The Default Key-Bind Is (R).    :)
body:
In This Mod You can swap your elytra to chestplate by only a key-bind without opening your inventory :)

Requirements:-  :)

You need elytra and chestplate both in your inventory.

And the mod :) [Obviously]

And Enjoy The mod :)

And follow and also join my discord and subscibe my channel on youtube :) [if you want]

[Youtube :)](https://www.youtube.com/@itachisx7-official)

[Discord :)](https://discord.gg/Qz3aEZ4PyK)
